zh.Darley Dale, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾達利 戴爾
zh.Bakewell, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾貝克韋爾_
zh.Tideswell, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾迪德斯維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Godfrey de Foljambe II於1343年出生在英國德比夏爾迪德斯維爾時，他的父親Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I26歲，母親Avena de Ireland27歲。他於1367年與Margaret de Villiers在英國德比夏爾迪德斯維爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1373年被列為commissioner of the peace 。他去世於1376年5月29日在英國德比夏爾達利 戴爾享年33歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾貝克韋爾_。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Godfrey de Foljambe II于1343年出生在英国德比夏爾迪德斯維爾时，他的父亲Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I26岁，母亲Avena de Ireland27岁。他于1367年与Margaret de Villiers在英国德比夏爾迪德斯維爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1373年被列为commissioner of the peace 。他去世于1376年5月29日在英国德比夏爾達利 戴爾享年33岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾貝克韋爾_。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Foljambe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French fol ‘foolish, silly’ + jambe ‘leg’, probably a nickname for a lame person, someone with a maimed or crooked leg; compare Belgian . In Old French fol could be used of something useless or of little value, e.g. farine folle ‘mill dust’.

variants.name: Fulljames
meanings: English: variant of Foljambe with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Belgian
meanings: Norman, English, Scottish: nickname from Anglo-Norman French bele jambe ‘fine leg’.

nameMeanings.name: Godfrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old French name Godefroy, which is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from god ‘god’ (or gōd ‘good’) + fred, frid ‘peace’. This was adopted by the Normans, and brought to England by immigrants from the Low Countries and France. It was borne by a Norman saint ( c.1066–1115 ) who became bishop of Amiens. There has been considerable confusion with Geoffrey .

en.lifeSummary: When Godfrey de Foljambe II was born in 1343, in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England, his father, Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I, was 26 and his mother, Avena de Ireland, was 27. He married Margaret de Villiers in 1367, in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. In 1373, his occupation is listed as commissioner of the peace . He died on 29 May 1376, in Darley Dale, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 33, and was buried in Bakewell, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Godfrey de Foljambe II est né en 1343, à Tideswell, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Avena de Ireland, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Villiers en 1367, à Tideswell, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. En 1373, sa profession de son indiquée est commissioner of the peace . Il est décédé le 29 mai 1376, à Darley Dale, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterré à Bakewell, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Godfrey de Foljambe II 1343 in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I 26 und seine Mutter Avena de Ireland 27. Er hat 1367 in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England Margaret de Villiers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. 1373 ist sein Beruf als commissioner of the peace  aufgeführt. Er starb am 29. Mai 1376 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Darley Dale, Derbyshire, England und wurde in Bakewell, Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Godfrey de Foljambe II è nato il nel 1343 nel Tideswell, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Avena de Ireland, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Villiers nel 1367, nel Tideswell, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Nel 1373, la sua occupazione è indicata come commissioner of the peace . Morì il 29 maggio 1376, nel Darley Dale, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolto a Bakewell, Derbyshire, England.

ja.Hassop, Derbyshire, England: イギリスデルブイシュアイアハソップ
ja.Darley Dale, Derbyshire, England: イギリスデルブイシュアイアダルリー ダル
ja.Bakewell, Derbyshire, England: イギリスデルブイシュアイアベイケウエル
ja.Tideswell, Derbyshire, England: イギリスデルブイシュアイアティデスウエル
ja.lifeSummary: Godfrey de Foljambe IIが1343年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアティデスウエルで生まれた時，父Sir Godfrey de Foljambe Iは26歳，母Avena de Irelandは27歳であった。1367年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアティデスウエルでMargaret de Villiersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1373年，職業はcommissioner of the peace と記録されている。彼は1376年5月29日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアダルリー ダルで33歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアベイケウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Godfrey de Foljambe II(이)가 1343년 영국 더비실르 티데스웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Avena de Ireland(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1367년 영국 더비실르 티데스웰에서 Margaret de Villiers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1373년, 그의 직업은 commissioner of the peace 이었다. 그는 1376년 5월 29일 영국 더비실르 더를리 데일에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 베이케웰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Godfrey de Foljambe II nasceu em 1343, em Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Avena de Ireland, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Villiers em 1367, em Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Em 1373, sua profissão aparece como commissioner of the peace . Ele faleceu em 29 de maio de 1376, em Darley Dale, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 33 anos, e foi sepultado em Bakewell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Godfrey de Foljambe II родился в 1343 г. в местности тидесвелл, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Avena de Ireland, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Villiers в 1367 г. в местности тидесвелл, дирбишир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1373 году он работал по профессии commissioner of the peace . Он умер 29 мая 1376 г. в местности дарли деил, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет и был похоронен в местности беикюелл, дирбишир, Англия.

sm.from 12 February 1373 to 1374: mai le 12 Fepuari 1373 e o'o I le 1374

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Godfrey de Foljambe II nació en 1343, en Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Godfrey de Foljambe I, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Avena de Ireland, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Margaret de Villiers en 1367, en Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. En 1373, su ocupación registrada era commissioner of the peace . Murió el 29 de mayo de 1376, en Darley Dale, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultado en Bakewell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
